option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">Slagalica</string>
<!-- Auth --> <string name="login">Prijava</string> <string name="register">Registracija</string> <string name="email">Email adresa</string> <string name="username">Korisničko ime</string> <string name="password">Lozinka</string> <string name="confirm_password">Potvrdi lozinku</string> <string name="region">Region</string> <string name="forgot_password">Zaboravili ste lozinku?</string> <string name="logout">Odjava</string>
<!-- Profil --> <string name="profile">Profil</string> <string name="tokens">Tokeni</string> <string name="stars">Zvezde</string> <string name="league">Liga</string> <string name="statistics">Statistika</string> <string name="change_avatar">Promeni avatar</string> <string name="games_played">Odigrane partije</string> <string name="win_rate">Procenat pobeda</string>
<!-- Igre --> <string name="ko_zna_zna">Ko zna zna</string> <string name="spojnice">Spojnice</string> <string name="asocijacije">Asocijacije</string> <string name="skocko">Skočko</string> <string name="korak_po_korak">Korak po korak</string> <string name="moj_broj">Moj broj</string> <string name="time_left">Preostalo vreme</string> <string name="your_score">Tvoji bodovi</string> <string name="opponent_score">Bodovi protivnika</string> <string name="question">Pitanje</string> <string name="question_mark">?</string> <string name="correct">Tačno!</string> <string name="wrong">Netačno!</string>
<!-- Navigacija --> <string name="home">Početna</string> <string name="leaderboard">Rang lista</string> <string name="friends">Prijatelji</string> <string name="regions">Regioni</string> <string name="notifications">Obaveštenja</string>
<!-- Korak po korak UI --> <string name="korak_player_label">Igra: Marko</string> <string name="korak_round_label">Runda 1/2</string> <string name="korak_score_label">0 ★</string> <string name="korak_guess_hint">Tvoja pretpostavka</string> <string name="korak_guess_button">Pogodi</string> <string name="korak_predaj_button">Predaj</string> <string name="korak_locked"> Zaključan</string> <string name="korak_time_up">Vreme je isteklo</string> <string name="korak_number_placeholder">1</string>
<!-- Home screen --> <string name="home_welcome">Dobrodošli! </string> <string name="home_ready">Spremni za igru?</string> <string name="home_find_opponent">Pronađi protivnika</string> <string name="home_token_cost">Troši 1 token po partiji</string> <string name="home_play">IGRAJ!</string> <string name="home_daily_missions">Dnevne misije</string> <string name="home_mission_win">Pobedi partiju</string> <string name="home_mission_chat">Pošalji poruku u čet</string> <string name="home_mission_friend">Odigraj prijateljsku partiju</string> <string name="home_mission_tournament">Pobedi partiju u turniru</string> <string name="home_mission_reward">+3 ⭐</string> <string name="home_korak_po_korak_button">Korak po korak</string> <string name="home_emoji_game"></string> <string name="home_emoji_trophy"></string> <string name="home_emoji_chat"></string> <string name="home_emoji_friends"></string> <string name="home_emoji_medal"></string>
<!-- Spojnice UI --> <string name="spojnice_title">Spojnice</string> <string name="spojnice_round">Runda 1/2</string> <string name="spojnice_timer_icon">⏱</string> <string name="spojnice_timer_value">30</string> <string name="spojnice_instruction">Povežite pojmove iz leve i desne kolone</string> <string name="spojnice_left_1">Pojam 1</string> <string name="spojnice_left_2">Pojam 2</string> <string name="spojnice_left_3">Pojam 3</string> <string name="spojnice_left_4">Pojam 4</string> <string name="spojnice_left_5">Pojam 5</string> <string name="spojnice_right_1">Odgovor 1</string> <string name="spojnice_right_2">Odgovor 2</string> <string name="spojnice_right_3">Odgovor 3</string> <string name="spojnice_right_4">Odgovor 4</string> <string name="spojnice_right_5">Odgovor 5</string> <string name="spojnice_next_game">Sledeća igra →</string>
<!-- Ko zna zna UI --> <string name="kzz_title">Ko zna zna</string> <string name="kzz_me">Ti</string> <string name="kzz_opponent">Protivnik</string> <string name="kzz_timer_icon">⏱</string> <string name="kzz_timer_value">5</string> <string name="kzz_score_zero">0</string> <string name="kzz_question_number">Pitanje 1/5</string> <string name="kzz_question_sample">Koji grad je glavni grad Srbije?</string> <string name="kzz_answer_a">Odgovor A</string> <string name="kzz_answer_b">Odgovor B</string> <string name="kzz_answer_c">Odgovor C</string> <string name="kzz_answer_d">Odgovor D</string> <string name="kzz_next_game">Sledeća igra →</string>
<!-- Skočko UI --> <string name="skocko_title">Skočko</string> <string name="skocko_timer_icon">⏱</string> <string name="skocko_timer_value">30</string> <string name="skocko_instruction">Pogodi kombinaciju od 4 simbola u 6 pokušaja!</string> <string name="skocko_symbols_label">Dostupni simboli:</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_black">⬛</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_white">⬜</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_red"></string> <string name="skocko_symbol_yellow"></string> <string name="skocko_symbol_triangle"></string> <string name="skocko_symbol_star">⭐</string> <string name="skocko_attempt_1">1.</string> <string name="skocko_attempt_2">2.</string> <string name="skocko_attempt_3">3.</string> <string name="skocko_next_game">Sledeća igra →</string>
<!-- Asocijacije UI --> <string name="asocijacije_title">Asocijacije</string> <string name="asocijacije_round">Runda 1/2</string> <string name="asocijacije_timer_icon">⏱</string> <string name="asocijacije_timer_value">120</string> <string name="asocijacije_placeholder">?</string> <string name="asocijacije_placeholder_final">???</string> <string name="asocijacije_final_solution">KONAČNO REŠENJE</string> <string name="asocijacije_answer_hint">Unesite odgovor...</string> <string name="asocijacije_next_game">Sledeća igra →</string>
<!-- Notifications UI --> <string name="notif_title">Obaveštenja</string> <string name="notif_icon_trophy"></string> <string name="notif_icon_game"></string> <string name="notif_rank_title">Plasman na rang listi</string> <string name="notif_rank_message">Čestitamo! Završili ste na 3. mestu!</string> <string name="notif_invite_title">Poziv za partiju</string> <string name="notif_invite_message">prijatelj_1 te poziva na partiju!</string>
<!-- Regions UI --> <string name="regions_title">Regioni Srbije</string> <string name="region_icon_vojvodina"></string> <string name="region_icon_beograd">️</string> <string name="region_icon_sumadija">⛰️</string> <string name="region_vojvodina">Vojvodina</string> <string name="region_beograd">Beograd</string> <string name="region_sumadija">Šumadija</string> <string name="region_vojvodina_score">245 ⭐</string> <string name="region_beograd_score">312 ⭐</string> <string name="region_sumadija_score">178 ⭐</string>
<!-- Leaderboard UI --> <string name="leaderboard_title">Rang lista</string> <string name="leaderboard_weekly">Nedeljno</string> <string name="leaderboard_monthly">Mesečno</string> <string name="leaderboard_date_range">01.05.2026 - 07.05.2026</string> <string name="leaderboard_medal_1"></string> <string name="leaderboard_medal_2"></string> <string name="leaderboard_medal_3"></string> <string name="leaderboard_player_1">igrač_1</string> <string name="leaderboard_player_2">igrač_2</string> <string name="leaderboard_player_3">igrač_3</string> <string name="leaderboard_league_3"> Liga 3</string> <string name="leaderboard_league_2"> Liga 2</string> <string name="leaderboard_league_1"> Liga 1</string> <string name="leaderboard_score_1">250 ⭐</string> <string name="leaderboard_score_2">180 ⭐</string> <string name="leaderboard_score_3">120 ⭐</string>
<!-- Friends UI --> <string name="friends_title">Prijatelji</string> <string name="friends_search_hint">Pretraži po korisničkom imenu</string> <string name="friends_user_1">prijatelj_1</string> <string name="friends_user_2">prijatelj_2</string> <string name="friends_user_1_meta"> Liga 2 · 150 ⭐</string> <string name="friends_user_2_meta"> Liga 1 · 80 ⭐</string> <string name="friends_play">Igraj</string>
<!-- Results UI --> <string name="results_win"> Pobedio si!</string> <string name="results_you">Ti</string> <string name="results_opponent">Protivnik</string> <string name="results_vs">VS</string> <string name="results_score_you">150</string> <string name="results_score_opponent">100</string> <string name="results_stars_label">Osvojene zvezde</string> <string name="results_stars_value">+13 ⭐</string> <string name="results_back_home">Nazad na početnu</string>
<!-- Register UI --> <string name="register_title">Registracija</string> <string name="register_have_account">Već imate nalog? </string> <string name="register_login_link">Prijavite se</string>
<!-- Profile UI --> <string name="profile_username_sample">korisnicko_ime</string> <string name="profile_email_sample">email@email.com</string> <string name="profile_region_sample"> Vojvodina</string> <string name="profile_league_sample"> Liga 0</string> <string name="profile_tokens_icon">️</string> <string name="profile_tokens_value">5</string> <string name="profile_tokens_label">Tokeni</string> <string name="profile_stars_icon">⭐</string> <string name="profile_stars_value">0</string> <string name="profile_stars_label">Zvezde</string> <string name="profile_qr_label">QR kod za prijatelje</string> <string name="profile_stats_title">Statistika</string> <string name="profile_total_games_label">Ukupno partija</string> <string name="profile_total_games_value">0</string> <string name="profile_win_rate_label">Procenat pobeda</string> <string name="profile_win_rate_value">0%</string> <string name="profile_kzz_stats">Ko zna zna — tačni/netačni odgovori</string> <string name="profile_spojnice_stats">Spojnice — uspešno povezani pojmovi</string>
<!-- Moj broj UI --> <string name="moj_broj_player">Igrac</string> <string name="moj_broj_round">Runda 1</string> <string name="moj_broj_score">0 bodova</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b1">B1</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b2">B2</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b3">B3</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b4">B4</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b5">B5</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b6">B6</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_left_paren">(</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_right_paren">)</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_plus">+</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_minus">-</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_mul">×</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_div">÷</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_delete">←</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_reset">C</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_stop">STOP</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_confirm">✓</string> <string name="moj_broj_give_up">Odustani</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">Slagalica</string>
<!-- Auth --> <string name="login">Prijava</string> <string name="register">Registracija</string> <string name="email">Email adresa</string> <string name="username">Korisničko ime</string> <string name="password">Lozinka</string> <string name="confirm_password">Potvrdi lozinku</string> <string name="region">Region</string> <string name="forgot_password">Zaboravili ste lozinku?</string> <string name="logout">Odjava</string>
<!-- Profil --> <string name="profile">Profil</string> <string name="tokens">Tokeni</string> <string name="stars">Zvezde</string> <string name="league">Liga</string> <string name="statistics">Statistika</string> <string name="change_avatar">Promeni avatar</string> <string name="games_played">Odigrane partije</string> <string name="win_rate">Procenat pobeda</string>
<!-- Igre --> <string name="ko_zna_zna">Ko zna zna</string> <string name="spojnice">Spojnice</string> <string name="asocijacije">Asocijacije</string> <string name="skocko">Skočko</string> <string name="korak_po_korak">Korak po korak</string> <string name="moj_broj">Moj broj</string> <string name="time_left">Preostalo vreme</string> <string name="your_score">Tvoji bodovi</string> <string name="opponent_score">Bodovi protivnika</string> <string name="question">Pitanje</string> <string name="question_mark">?</string> <string name="correct">Tačno!</string> <string name="wrong">Netačno!</string>
<!-- Navigacija --> <string name="home">Početna</string> <string name="leaderboard">Rang lista</string> <string name="friends">Prijatelji</string> <string name="regions">Regioni</string> <string name="notifications">Obaveštenja</string>
<!-- Korak po korak UI --> <string name="korak_player_label">Igra: Marko</string> <string name="korak_round_label">Runda 1/2</string> <string name="korak_score_label">0 ★</string> <string name="korak_guess_hint">Tvoja pretpostavka</string> <string name="korak_guess_button">Pogodi</string> <string name="korak_predaj_button">Predaj</string> <string name="korak_locked"> Zaključan</string> <string name="korak_time_up">Vreme je isteklo</string> <string name="korak_number_placeholder">1</string>
<!-- Home screen --> <string name="home_welcome">Dobrodošli! </string> <string name="home_ready">Spremni za igru?</string> <string name="home_find_opponent">Pronađi protivnika</string> <string name="home_token_cost">Troši 1 token po partiji</string> <string name="home_play">IGRAJ!</string> <string name="home_daily_missions">Dnevne misije</string> <string name="home_mission_win">Pobedi partiju</string> <string name="home_mission_chat">Pošalji poruku u čet</string> <string name="home_mission_friend">Odigraj prijateljsku partiju</string> <string name="home_mission_tournament">Pobedi partiju u turniru</string> <string name="home_mission_reward">+3 ⭐</string> <string name="home_korak_po_korak_button">Korak po korak</string> <string name="home_emoji_game"></string> <string name="home_emoji_trophy"></string> <string name="home_emoji_chat"></string> <string name="home_emoji_friends"></string> <string name="home_emoji_medal"></string>
<!-- Spojnice UI --> <string name="spojnice_title">Spojnice</string> <string name="spojnice_round">Runda 1/2</string> <string name="spojnice_timer_icon">⏱</string> <string name="spojnice_timer_value">30</string> <string name="spojnice_instruction">Povežite pojmove iz leve i desne kolone</string> <string name="spojnice_left_1">Pojam 1</string> <string name="spojnice_left_2">Pojam 2</string> <string name="spojnice_left_3">Pojam 3</string> <string name="spojnice_left_4">Pojam 4</string> <string name="spojnice_left_5">Pojam 5</string> <string name="spojnice_right_1">Odgovor 1</string> <string name="spojnice_right_2">Odgovor 2</string> <string name="spojnice_right_3">Odgovor 3</string> <string name="spojnice_right_4">Odgovor 4</string> <string name="spojnice_right_5">Odgovor 5</string> <string name="spojnice_next_game">Sledeća igra →</string>
<!-- Ko zna zna UI --> <string name="kzz_title">Ko zna zna</string> <string name="kzz_me">Ti</string> <string name="kzz_opponent">Protivnik</string> <string name="kzz_timer_icon">⏱</string> <string name="kzz_timer_value">5</string> <string name="kzz_score_zero">0</string> <string name="kzz_question_number">Pitanje 1/5</string> <string name="kzz_question_sample">Koji grad je glavni grad Srbije?</string> <string name="kzz_answer_a">Odgovor A</string> <string name="kzz_answer_b">Odgovor B</string> <string name="kzz_answer_c">Odgovor C</string> <string name="kzz_answer_d">Odgovor D</string> <string name="kzz_next_game">Sledeća igra →</string>
<!-- Skočko UI --> <string name="skocko_title">Skočko</string> <string name="skocko_timer_icon">⏱</string> <string name="skocko_timer_value">30</string> <string name="skocko_instruction">Pogodi kombinaciju od 4 simbola u 6 pokušaja!</string> <string name="skocko_symbols_label">Dostupni simboli:</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_black">⬛</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_white">⬜</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_red"></string> <string name="skocko_symbol_yellow"></string> <string name="skocko_symbol_triangle"></string> <string name="skocko_symbol_star">⭐</string> <string name="skocko_attempt_1">1.</string> <string name="skocko_attempt_2">2.</string> <string name="skocko_attempt_3">3.</string> <string name="skocko_next_game">Sledeća igra →</string>
<!-- Asocijacije UI --> <string name="asocijacije_title">Asocijacije</string> <string name="asocijacije_round">Runda 1/2</string> <string name="asocijacije_timer_icon">⏱</string> <string name="asocijacije_timer_value">120</string> <string name="asocijacije_placeholder">?</string> <string name="asocijacije_placeholder_final">???</string> <string name="asocijacije_final_solution">KONAČNO REŠENJE</string> <string name="asocijacije_answer_hint">Unesite odgovor...</string> <string name="asocijacije_next_game">Sledeća igra →</string>
<!-- Notifications UI --> <string name="notif_title">Obaveštenja</string> <string name="notif_icon_trophy"></string> <string name="notif_icon_game"></string> <string name="notif_rank_title">Plasman na rang listi</string> <string name="notif_rank_message">Čestitamo! Završili ste na 3. mestu!</string> <string name="notif_invite_title">Poziv za partiju</string> <string name="notif_invite_message">prijatelj_1 te poziva na partiju!</string>
<!-- Regions UI --> <string name="regions_title">Regioni Srbije</string> <string name="region_icon_vojvodina"></string> <string name="region_icon_beograd">️</string> <string name="region_icon_sumadija">⛰️</string> <string name="region_vojvodina">Vojvodina</string> <string name="region_beograd">Beograd</string> <string name="region_sumadija">Šumadija</string> <string name="region_vojvodina_score">245 ⭐</string> <string name="region_beograd_score">312 ⭐</string> <string name="region_sumadija_score">178 ⭐</string>
<!-- Leaderboard UI --> <string name="leaderboard_title">Rang lista</string> <string name="leaderboard_weekly">Nedeljno</string> <string name="leaderboard_monthly">Mesečno</string> <string name="leaderboard_date_range">01.05.2026 - 07.05.2026</string> <string name="leaderboard_medal_1"></string> <string name="leaderboard_medal_2"></string> <string name="leaderboard_medal_3"></string> <string name="leaderboard_player_1">igrač_1</string> <string name="leaderboard_player_2">igrač_2</string> <string name="leaderboard_player_3">igrač_3</string> <string name="leaderboard_league_3"> Liga 3</string> <string name="leaderboard_league_2"> Liga 2</string> <string name="leaderboard_league_1"> Liga 1</string> <string name="leaderboard_score_1">250 ⭐</string> <string name="leaderboard_score_2">180 ⭐</string> <string name="leaderboard_score_3">120 ⭐</string>
<!-- Friends UI --> <string name="friends_title">Prijatelji</string> <string name="friends_search_hint">Pretraži po korisničkom imenu</string> <string name="friends_user_1">prijatelj_1</string> <string name="friends_user_2">prijatelj_2</string> <string name="friends_user_1_meta"> Liga 2 · 150 ⭐</string> <string name="friends_user_2_meta"> Liga 1 · 80 ⭐</string> <string name="friends_play">Igraj</string>
<!-- Results UI --> <string name="results_win"> Pobedio si!</string> <string name="results_you">Ti</string> <string name="results_opponent">Protivnik</string> <string name="results_vs">VS</string> <string name="results_score_you">150</string> <string name="results_score_opponent">100</string> <string name="results_stars_label">Osvojene zvezde</string> <string name="results_stars_value">+13 ⭐</string> <string name="results_back_home">Nazad na početnu</string>
<!-- Register UI --> <string name="register_title">Registracija</string> <string name="register_have_account">Već imate nalog? </string> <string name="register_login_link">Prijavite se</string>
<!-- Profile UI --> <string name="profile_username_sample">korisnicko_ime</string> <string name="profile_email_sample">email@email.com</string> <string name="profile_region_sample"> Vojvodina</string> <string name="profile_league_sample"> Liga 0</string> <string name="profile_tokens_icon">️</string> <string name="profile_tokens_value">5</string> <string name="profile_tokens_label">Tokeni</string> <string name="profile_stars_icon">⭐</string> <string name="profile_stars_value">0</string> <string name="profile_stars_label">Zvezde</string> <string name="profile_qr_label">QR kod za prijatelje</string> <string name="profile_stats_title">Statistika</string> <string name="profile_total_games_label">Ukupno partija</string> <string name="profile_total_games_value">0</string> <string name="profile_win_rate_label">Procenat pobeda</string> <string name="profile_win_rate_value">0%</string> <string name="profile_kzz_stats">Ko zna zna — tačni/netačni odgovori</string> <string name="profile_spojnice_stats">Spojnice — uspešno povezani pojmovi</string>
<!-- Moj broj UI --> <string name="moj_broj_player">Igrac</string> <string name="moj_broj_round">Runda 1</string> <string name="moj_broj_score">0 bodova</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b1">B1</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b2">B2</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b3">B3</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b4">B4</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b5">B5</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_b6">B6</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_left_paren">(</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_right_paren">)</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_plus">+</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_minus">-</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_mul">×</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_div">÷</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_delete">←</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_reset">C</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_stop">STOP</string> <string name="moj_broj_key_confirm">✓</string> <string name="moj_broj_give_up">Odustani</string>
<!-- Main UI --> <string name="main_app_name">Slagalica</string> <string name="main_tokens_icon">️</string> <string name="main_tokens_value">5</string> <string name="main_stars_icon">⭐</string> <string name="main_stars_value">0</string> <string name="main_league_icon"></string> <string name="main_league_value">Liga 0</string>
<!-- Login UI --> <string name="login_title">Slagalica</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Dobrodošli nazad!</string> <string name="login_no_account">Nemate nalog? </string> <string name="login_register_link">Registrujte se</string> <string name="login_guest">Nastavi bez registracije</string>
<!-- Forgot Password UI --> <string name="forgot_title">Resetovanje lozinke</string> <string name="forgot_subtitle">Unesite staru i novu lozinku</string> <string name="forgot_old_password">Stara lozinka</string> <string name="forgot_new_password">Nova lozinka</string> <string name="forgot_confirm_password">Potvrdi novu lozinku</string> <string name="forgot_reset_button">Resetuj lozinku</string> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: # Project-wide Gradle settings. # IDE (e.g. Android Studio) users: # Gradle settings configured through the IDE *will override* # any settings specified in this file. # For more details on how to configure your build environment visit # http://www.gradle.org/docs/current/userguide/build_environment.html # Specifies the JVM arguments used for the daemon process. # The setting is particularly useful for tweaking memory settings. org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 # When configured, Gradle will run in incubating parallel mode. # This option should only be used with decoupled projects. For more details, visit # https://developer.android.com/r/tools/gradle-multi-project-decoupled-projects # org.gradle.parallel=true

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: # Project-wide Gradle settings. # IDE (e.g. Android Studio) users: # Gradle settings configured through the IDE *will override* # any settings specified in this file. # For more details on how to configure your build environment visit # http://www.gradle.org/docs/current/userguide/build_environment.html # Specifies the JVM arguments used for the daemon process. # The setting is particularly useful for tweaking memory settings. org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx4096m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 # When configured, Gradle will run in incubating parallel mode. # This option should only be used with decoupled projects. For more details, visit # https://developer.android.com/r/tools/gradle-multi-project-decoupled-projects # org.gradle.parallel=true android.enableDexingArtifactTransform=false
